text.title: modular-monolith Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for modular-monolith as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Module named after technical role, not business domain
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: utils/, helpers/, common/ become dumping grounds for cross-module logic, recreating tight coupling

failure-mode.description: Extracting service code while keeping tables in the shared monolith database
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Creates tight runtime coupling via the database; the extracted service cannot be deployed independently and schema changes still block the monolith
